tests_run.details: Regenerated mapping calibration, scorecard, and findings; coverage 7/277 (3%), grade D; product findings 0, ambiguous findings 4, mapping-blocked 0, ready-for-rerun 0.

Confirmed the bank_name-focused findings export: 6 trusted executed observations, 2 passed, 4 manual-review, 0 skipped, and recommended next tooling work that explicitly points to tightening the Physical Operating Address post-toggle capture.

bank_name.control: page-1 DocuSign Text visible/editable merchant input at ordinal 62
bank_name.separation: The trusted bank_name evidence stayed off routing number, account number, bank_account_type, deposit method, bank-address, phone, email, date, numeric, upload, signature, acknowledgement, and finalization controls.

next_move.reason: The latest findings explicitly say to tighten the post-toggle capture anchor, bounds, or DOM selector so the sanitized payload isolates the Physical Operating Address block and recovers field-local labels. That one non-live workstream can unlock four blocked business_mailing concepts, which is a better coverage return than the remaining single-concept live options.

key_outcome: BANKNAMELEDGER updated the cumulative coverage ledger to record bank_name as live-proven, raised the cumulative live-proven concept count from 26 to 27, and replaced the stale bank_name-next recommendation with a non-live Physical Operating Address capture resolver recommendation.
blockers: Physical Operating Address post-toggle capture still does not isolate field-local labels for business_mailing_*.
registered_state remains blocked by live target availability despite offline label trust.
document_type is plausible but only a one-concept singleton, so it is not the highest-yield next move.
uncertainty: document_type remains a credible follow-up singleton after the address capture resolver, but the current artifacts point more strongly to the four-concept Physical Operating Address unlock.
The latest scorecard and findings remain latest-run scoped and should not be treated as cumulative coverage snapshots.
next_recommendation: Run PHYSICALOPERATINGADDRESSRESOLVER as a strictly non-live capture-isolation workstream for business_mailing_address_line_1, business_mailing_city, business_mailing_state, and business_mailing_postal_code.
